name: Under Par Simulators
about: Under Par Simulators is an indoor golf venue located in Adrian, Michigan, offering a technologically advanced experience for golfers of all skill levels. The facility features high-precision simulators with accurate ball tracking, realistic course visuals, and engaging gameplay. With flexible booking options for solo play, group sessions, tournaments, leagues, or private parties, the venue is tailored to various schedules. It provides a premium entertainment environment with spacious bays, comfortable seating, bar tops, and 8 flatscreen TVs for watching sports.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art EYE XO and GSPro simulators with precise ball tracking and immersive gameplay
Flexible booking options for solo practice, group sessions, tournaments, and private parties
Premium entertainment environment with sports TVs and comfortable, spacious bays

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed; food permitted from outside

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual high-speed cameras, non-marked ball technology, supports left/right-handed golfers
Next-generation golf simulation with ultra-realistic ball physics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) is allowed, and you can bring your own food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 2-3 hours, depending on the number of players and your pace.

faq.question: Is Under Par Simulators kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and offers a welcoming environment for junior golfers.
